name: KL Batten 72

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: F744BF2E-40D3-4D2B-B461-1FCB40950E2F

comment: The KL BATTEN 72 is built for stages and studios that demand rich, full-spectrum color and commanding output. Its advanced RGBMA engine delivers smooth, natural light that blends cleanly across scenery. At the same time, more than 61,000 lumens provide confident, room-filling coverage for large cycs, wide sets, and high-impact scenic looks.

capabilities.comment: Random Strobe Effect Slow to Fast
